testcase.name: test_demo_request_access
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_features_iteration18.py:42: in test_demo_request_access assert r.status_code in (200, 201, 404), f"Unexpected: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: Unexpected: 422 {"success":false,"error":{"code":"VALIDATION_ERROR","message":"Validasi gagal","details":[{"loc":["body","case_slug"],"msg":"Field required","type":"missing"}]}} E assert 422 in (200, 201, 404) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
